clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall perform the drone services described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] at [OPERATION_LOCATION] on [OPERATION_DATE].

The Service Provider warrants that it holds any license, registration, or authorization required by the applicable aviation authority to operate a drone at [OPERATION_LOCATION] on [OPERATION_DATE], and shall comply with all operational restrictions imposed by that authority.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.

The Service Provider shall maintain liability insurance covering its drone operations in an amount of at least [INSURANCE_COVERAGE_AMOUNT], and shall provide proof of coverage to the Client upon request.
The Client shall reimburse the Service Provider's reasonable, pre-approved travel expenses in addition to [TOTAL_VALUE].

The Service Provider may postpone or cancel a flight at [OPERATION_LOCATION] if, in its reasonable professional judgment, weather conditions would compromise the safety of the flight. A postponement or cancellation under this Clause is not a breach of this Agreement, and the Parties shall reschedule under the Timeline Clause.

If an equipment malfunction, safety incident, or emergency occurs during a flight, the Service Provider shall immediately land the drone, notify the Client, and, where required by applicable law, notify the relevant aviation or safety authority.

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.

The Service Provider shall operate within the following limitations at [OPERATION_LOCATION]: maximum altitude of [MAX_ALTITUDE], and shall not fly over [RESTRICTED_AREAS] without separate written authorization from the Client and any applicable authority.
The Services shall take place on [OPERATION_DATE] at [OPERATION_LOCATION], subject to rescheduling under the Weather Conditions Clause.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform to the extent that failure results from a grounding order, airspace restriction, or other event beyond that Party's reasonable control affecting [OPERATION_DATE].

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
